title: CLI for single + sweep replay: N configs × date range → ranked comparison table + JSON output
objective: Payoff for the replay track: an operator-friendly CLI that sweeps multiple configs against a date range and prints a ranked comparison, multiplying learning velocity.
forbidden_actions: Modify the harness core (that was REPLAY_HARNESS_BUILD_001)
Add dashboard/UI for results in this task
required_work: 1. Extend tools/replay.py with --single and --sweep modes and YAML config loading.
3. Run configs (threads OK) and print ranked comparison table to stdout + text file.
4. Write full per-config ReplayResult JSON to results/sweep_TIMESTAMP.json.
6. Run a 3-7 day × several configs sweep and include summary in result.
acceptance_criteria: --single runs one config end-to-end and prints summary
--sweep runs N configs and prints sorted comparison table
YAML sweep config expands list values into cross-product
7-day × 10 configs target: finishes in < 2 minutes OR report actual time + suggestion
verification: Paste CLI invocation and stdout output
Show text table from a real sweep run
